2of Standard Written English?

Sentence 1: No reason wears at least six heights.
Sentence 2: No reason wears more than six heights.

Answer with ONLY the single digit 1 or 2 — no other text.

2

(Note: While both sentences are semantically nonsensical/anomalous, "more than" is generally more grammatically acceptable with count nouns than "at least" in certain negative polarity contexts, though in standard syntactic tests of grammar, Sentence 2 is typically rated as more acceptable/natural in its structure.)
